topic: How to Read Your Body Graph
learningGoal: User can identify the 9 centers on their body graph and understand which are defined vs undefined.
keyPoints: Your body graph is the geometric figure in the center of your Free Energy Blueprint â€” it shows your 9 energy centers
A colored center means it is Defined: you have a consistent, reliable source of that energy
A white center means it is Undefined: you are open to receiving and amplifying that energy from your environment
Find your Throat Center â€” the center at the top of the diamond shape â€” this governs how you communicate and manifest
Defined centers are your strengths and consistent gifts; undefined centers are where you are most adaptive and wise
toneNotes: Visual and pedagogical. The viewer is looking at their chart while watching. Each keyPoint references a specific visual element. Be spatial and precise.
script: The large geometric figure at the center of your Prime Self dashboard is your body graph. It maps nine energy centers â€” the triangles and squares connected by channels. A center filled with color means it is Defined. You have a consistent, reliable source of that energy. It shows up the same way in you, day after day. A white center means it is Undefined. You take in and amplify that energy from the people and spaces around you. Neither is better. Your defined centers are your consistent gifts. Your undefined centers are where you are most adaptive, most wise, and most open to learning. Start by finding your Throat Center â€” the triangle near the top of the diamond shape. It governs how you express, communicate, and bring things into form. Then look at how many centers you have defined. That tells you how much consistent energy you carry and how much you absorb from your environment.
